name: WFBE_NEURODEF_HEAVY_WALLS_V4
notes: HEAVY FACTORY WALLS V4 (flag WFBE_C_WALLS_V4, default 0; V3 stays live default). FULL array: exact legacy 13x Land_HBarrier_large enclosure (verbatim) + redesigned Concrete_Wall_EP1 slab layer OUTSIDE the ring at the HQ 2.2 m overlap pitch. HARD CONSTRAINT: armor exits +X (Client_BuildUnit.sqf) - the +X face carries ZERO slabs and no slab sits east of x=1.8 on the north/south faces, so the whole egress corridor stays open. Fixes the V3 offenders explicitly: the lone single panels at [-3.6,16] and [-3.6,-17.5] are replaced by contiguous 5-slab runs along the north (y=16) and south (y=-17.5) faces (west halves only, ending x=1.8 so the legacy north x 0.5-6.5 / south x 1.5-6.5 walking gaps stay open). The -X backing layer is split into a lower pair + upper 5-run so the legacy -X walking gap (y -6.5 to -0.5) stays passable through the slab layer too. Land_CncBlock_Stripes accents at all three walking-gap mouths. No lone singles anywhere; runs mirrored north/south.

objs.role: V4 slab - -X lower pair (south of walking gap)
V4 slab - -X upper run (north of walking gap)
V4 slab - north run (replaces V3 lone single at [-3.6,16])
V4 slab - north run (east end x=1.8, clear of the x 0.5-6.5 walking gap)
V4 slab - south run (replaces V3 lone single at [-3.6,-17.5])
V4 slab - south run (east end clear of the south walking gap)
V4 accent - north walking-gap mouth west
V4 accent - north walking-gap mouth east
V4 accent - south walking-gap mouth west
